creator: stephen@math.missouri.edu
text:
I see that this software I ported from http://www.compass.com/synaptics/
has been updated, so I am going to work on updating this port -
and probably be changing its name to tpconfig as well.  So if
by some small chance someone is working on committing this, please
wait a day or so.  (Anyway this port is in the old layout.)

--
